questionHtml: Write down the integral that Gabriel can use to find the exact area of the shaded part of the cross-section.
markschemeHtml:
∫01002x-x5+1 dx                    A1A1

Note: Award A1 for correct function seen within the integral and A1 for correct limits in the correct location and the inclusion of the dx.

[2 marks]
